Trigger: Complete an Event using only Ranks 1-5
Flavor: Who needs experience when you have enthusiasm?

Trigger: Complete an Event using 3 or fewer cards
Flavor: Why use six when two will do? In and out before they know what hit them.

Trigger: On your turn, you may Recruit from Lineup Slot 1 and then Complete an Event using that Recruit
Flavor: Nobody wanted this event. You saw what they didn't. That's why you're the coach.

Trigger: End of turn: Have exactly 0 Shinies
Flavor: We're broke. You'll have to win this one with heart kid.

Trigger: End of turn: Have 8+ Shinies.
Flavor: We don't need a plan. We need a VAULT.

Trigger: Complete an Event while you have 2+ fewer completed Events than the leader
Flavor: The audience loves a loser. Let's give them a show.

Trigger: Complete an Event using at least one Rank 10 card
Flavor: The veterans show up when it matters.

Trigger: Complete an Event worth 9 VP or more
Flavor: Championships aren't won in the practice squad.

Trigger: Complete an Event using exactly 4 cards
Flavor: Not too many, not too few. Just enough to keep them guessing.

Trigger: On your turn, you may Recruit from Lineup Slot 2 (paying its Slot Price) and then Complete an Event using that Recruit
Flavor: Half the roster is mercenaries. The other half doesn't ask questions.

Trigger: Complete an Event with any Sum requirement.
Flavor: Not approximately. Exactly. Champions live in the margins.

Trigger: Draft a card from the Lineup that has 3+ Shinies sitting on it.
Flavor: One coach's leftovers are another coach's feast.

Trigger: End of turn: 2 or fewer cards in hand and you completed an Event this turn.
Flavor: If you can still walk you didn't play hard enough.

Trigger: Recruit a card from Lineup Slot 4 (rightmost)
Flavor: Go big or go home. The expensive seats have the best view.

Trigger: Use a Timeout to flush a Jumbotron event worth 8+ VP.
Flavor: That event looked fun. Shame it's gone. Anyway, here's a cookie.

Trigger: Complete an Event from a hand of 7+ cards
Flavor: Why throw two when you can throw eight? Overwhelm the defense.

Trigger: On your turn, you may Recruit from Lineup Slot 3 or 4 (paying its Slot Price) and then Complete an Event using that Recruit
Flavor: Fresh on the board. Gone before anyone blinked. That's a statement.

Trigger: Complete an Event using only cards from a single faction with no Free Agents
Flavor: Strength isn't diverse. Strength is redundant.

Trigger: When completing an Event: pay 5 Shinies immediately after scoring
Flavor: Brought to you by Sludge-O-Cola. Taste the Chrome!

Trigger: Complete an event whose reward causes an opponent to lose a card or Shiny.
Flavor: Nothing personal, Coach. Well . . . maybe a little of it was personal.

Trigger: End of turn: Leader has 4+ completed Events and you are not the leader.
Flavor: It's not a comeback unless you wait until the last second.

Trigger: Complete your 4th event.
Flavor: First one's luck. Second one's skill. Third one's habit. Fourth one's legacy.

Trigger: Complete Photo Finish or Sudden Death
Flavor: The whole stadium went quiet. Then it didn't.

Trigger: Complete your 5th Event with 2 or fewer cards in hand after scoring
Flavor: Clock's ticking. Close your eyes and throw.
